form:Columns.note: === Iterador === El [[wiki:Nomad.Generico.Iterador.wiki|iterador]] es una grupo de controles utizados para la navegacion entre los distintos registros filtrados.
form:Columns.name: columns1

form:LVColumn.additional: <OPTS><OPT value="MB" text="Muy Baja" /><OPT value="B" text="Baja" /><OPT value="N" text="Normal" /><OPT value="A" text="Alta" /><OPT value="MA" text="Muy Alta" /></OPTS>
form:LVColumn.label: Nivel de Criticidad
form:LVColumn.name: c_criticidad

form:Button.name: ACCEPT_OBJETOS
form:Button.descrip: Guardar Datos de los Objetos de Reclamo
form:Button.label: Aceptar

form:Button.name: ACCEPT_ATRIBUTOS
form:Button.descrip: Guardar Datos de los Atributos Procesales
form:Button.label: Aceptar

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG33_ROL.oi_rol, LEG33_ROL.d_rol, LEG33_ROL.c_partes, LEG33_ROL.c_objeto_carpeta FROM LEG33_ROL ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_modulo = \'LEG\' AND ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = {#SOURCE:@c_parametro} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG40_SUJETOS.d_sujeto FROM LEG40_SUJETOS WHERE LEG40_SUJETOS.oi_sujeto= {#SOURCE:@oi_sujeto} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG42_TIPO_CARPETA.n_porcentaje FROM LEG42_TIPO_CARPETA WHERE LEG42_TIPO_CARPETA.oi_tipo_carpeta= {#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_carpeta} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG33_ROL.oi_rol FROM LEG33_ROL WHERE LEG33_ROL.c_rol = {#SOURCE:@c_rol} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG40_SUJETOS.oi_sujeto FROM LEG40_SUJETOS WHERE LEG40_SUJETOS.c_sujeto = {#SOURCE:@c_sujeto} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG49_SECRETARIA.d_domicilio FROM LEG49_SECRETARIA WHERE LEG49_SECRETARIA.oi_secretaria= {#SOURCE:@oi_secretaria} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT E.oi_estado
FROM LEG31_ESTADOS as E
WHERE
E.d_estado = \'Cerrado\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT E.oi_estado
FROM LEG31_ESTADOS as E
WHERE
E.d_estado = \'Baja de Conflicto\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: getObject
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL (' SELECT O.d_objeto_reclamo FROM LEG32_OBJ_RECLAMOS as O WHERE O.oi_objeto_reclamo = {$PARAM/@oi_objeto_reclamo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryIsCerrado
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT C.oi_carpeta
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS as C
WHERE C.l_cerrado = 1 AND C.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
') /ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryGetEstadoCarpeta
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT C.oi_estado_carpeta FROM LEG01_CARPETAS as C WHERE C.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
') /ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryGetAdelanto
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT A.oi_adelanto FROM LEG04_ADELANTOS as A WHERE A.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryGetTarea
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL (' SELECT T.oi_tarea FROM LEG03_TAREAS as T WHERE T.oi_carpeta = {$PARAM/@oi_carpeta} AND T.oi_estado_tarea in (1,2)
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryGetObjetosTipo
